name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, unclear expense categorization causes reimbursement delays. We automate categorization and compliance instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in categorizing travel expenses and ensuring policy compliance.
